title: Blocks With Borders
description: Adds borders to important blocks like ores and suspiscious blocks! With major mod support!
body:
BlocksWithBorders Vanilla Features

All Vanilla Ores
![ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf199107d1e911c796fbddabb083b971e3e234f5.png)

Sus Sand/Gravel
![sus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7efda08bf83e923509b32f2227aca893f221e6a8.png)

Budding Amethyst
![bud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd26880ccc85d9654e30f1767c1f27b9d2bce88b.png)

Powdered Snow
![snow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831e6f2612493901f96d0e04166219a8db28cd96.png)

Trapped Chest
![trap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bfba8cbc751049abb1d895fb9345061691ce186.png)
 

Supported Mods

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
